channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Things get nasty in lawsuit between WordPress.org and WP Engine
item.description: After years of nasty back and forth accusations between WordPress hosting provider WP Engine (WPE) and WordPress.org, the open source project that provides the software, on Wednesday WPE sued WordPress.org in federal court, accusing WordPress.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Visual Studio Code 1.94 boosts file finding
item.description: The September 2024 release of Microsoft’s Visual Studio Code editor, version 1.94, features improvements for finding files using the File Explorer. The upgrade also introduces the ability to run Python tests with coverage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why OpenAI needs another $6.6 billion in VC money
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Why Uber and Lyft drivers are using risky DIY Tesla robotaxis
item.description: A self-driving Tesla carrying a passenger for Uber rammed into an SUV at an intersection in suburban Las Vegas in April, an accident that sparked new concerns that a growing stable of self-styled “robotaxis” is exploiting a regulatory gray area in U.S. cities, putting lives at risk.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: OSINT unveiled: The technology behind the intelligence
item.description: How is the Army leveraging OSINT to strengthen its intelligence capabilities? The post OSINT unveiled: The technology behind the intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Elder Fraud: A Growing Concern in the United States
item.description: Elder fraud is on the rise, with Americans over 60 losing $3.4 billion to scams in 2023 alone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Understanding VBS Enclaves, Windows’ new security technology
item.description: Recently Microsoft announced efforts to improve security in its planned Recall AI assistant tool. Many of the details were not a surprise, as it built on familiar tools and services I’ve written about during the past few years, but the most important feature, VBS Enclaves, will be new to most of us.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Supermercados BM apuesta por la digitalización de su cadena de suministro gracias a la IA
item.description: La transformación digital de cualquier negocio, independientemente de su sector de actividad, es clave para su supervivencia.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Spider lovers scurry to Colorado town in search of mating tarantulas and community
item.description: It’s tarantula mating season on the Colorado plains, when male spiders scurry out of their burrows in search of a mate.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Peipert And Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bumble, Grindr, and Match have agreed to Australia’s online dating code of conduct
item.description: A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday. Bumble, Grindr and Match Group Inc.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Biden signs bill cutting environmental reviews for semiconductor industry
item.description: President Biden on Wednesday signed legislation exempting semiconductor manufacturing facilities from environmental reviews — despite objections from some Democrats and green activists who have expressed concerns about the potential for toxic waste.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: ChatGPT maker OpenAI raises $6.6 billion in fresh funding as it moves away from its nonprofit roots
item.description: OpenAI says it has raised $6.6 billion in venture capital investments as part of a broader shift by the ChatGPT maker away from its nonprofit roots.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dirty romance novels are shedding their stigma thanks to TikTok
item.description: By now everyone is familiar with #BookTok—but have you stumbled across its spicier cousin #SmutTok? “Smut” refers to books that include one or more sexually explicit scenes and surprisingly (or perhaps unsurprisingly) the erotic category has found a growing fan base on TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Appeals court reinstates Indiana lawsuit against TikTok alleging child safety, privacy concerns
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Indiana Court of Appeals has reinstated a lawsuit filed by the state accusing TikTok of deceiving its users about the video-sharing platform's level of inappropriate content for children and the security of its consumers’ personal information.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Swiss glaciers are receding again after 2 punishing years and despite a good start to 2024
item.description: Experts say the volume of Switzerland’s glaciers shrank again this summer and compounded the negative impact of climate change after a devastating two-year run that depleted the ice by more than 10%.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Federal Cyber Jobs on the Rise: ONCD's Efforts to Lower Barriers
item.description: The White House Office of the National Cyber Director is leading a push to transition nearly 100,000 federal IT and cyber jobs to skills-based hiring by summer 2025.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: Australia’s government says a code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Two good Visual Studio Code alternatives
item.description: The conductor of my choir famously tells us singers, “I only want everything all the time.” Well, as a developer, my mantra for code editors and IDEs (integrated development environments) is exactly that: I only want everything all the time.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Arkansas sues YouTube over claims that the site is fueling a mental health crisis
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas sued YouTube and parent company Alphabet on Monday, saying the video-sharing platform is made deliberately addictive and fueling a mental health crisis among youth in the state.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile service outages reported by users
item.description: People in multiple cities posted about issues they were having, with many saying their phones were in "SOS" mode.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Explained: How Salesforce Agentforce’s Atlas reasoning engine works to power AI agents
item.description: Salesforce’s recently launched Agentforce suite of low-code tools is betting on a human-like reasoning engine called Atlas that could be a game-changer in building AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to succeed with Kubernetes
item.description: Kubernetes, the open source orchestration platform for automating the deployment and management of containerized workloads and services, continues to gain popularity.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Android's latest nightmare: millions of devices infected by sneaky malware
item.description: There have been cases when widely downloaded apps from the Play Store are infected with malware. Kurt the CyberGuy tackles the issue of a new Trojan malware.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cruise ship surgery that slices giants for mega profits
item.description: A whopping 30 million people will have taken cruises in 2024, and some ships being built to keep up with this demand cost as much as $2 billion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese EV tech ban not an overreaction: National security experts
item.description: A tech ban on EVs will limit the Chinese government from accessing data on American drivers, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Lionsgate's bold move into AI is about to change filmmaking forever
item.description: Lionsgate's revolutionary move to partner with tech company Runway to integrate AI into its production process is going to take the film industry by storm.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon's $4 billion partnership with AI startup Anthropic gets UK competition clearance
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Friday that it's clearing Amazon's partnership with artificial intelligence company Anthropic because the $4 billion deal didn't qualify for further scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
